race.description: Gallopers Sports Club F&M Mdn Plate
race.comment: SATURDAYS GIRL (3) is unlucky to still be a maiden hitting the top four in her past five outings and strikes a very winnable contest here. Gets the services of Maloney to navigate from the sticky alley and should be right there when the whips are cracking. Former NSW galloper ARCTIC BRIGHT (4) placed over this distance range when having the first run for the new stable and should find this easier than what she faced down south. Looms as the main danger. JUSTA BARTY (5) may have suffered from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out but the Gold Coast placing when resuming was full of merit. Can bounce right back. TASSORATI (10) strips fitter second-up from the spell and must be respected out of the Gollan yard. In the mix. URBAN PRINCESS (11) next best in a race with only a handful of chances.
